en: At that time Merodach-baladan the son of Baladan, king of Babylon, sent envoys with letters and a present to Hezekiah, for he heard that he had been sick and had recovered.
zh: 那時，巴比倫王巴拉但的兒子米羅達．巴拉但，聽說希西家病了，又痊愈了，就派人送信和禮物給希西家。

en: And Hezekiah welcomed them gladly. And he showed them his treasure house, the silver, the gold, the spices, the precious oil, his whole armory, all that was found in his storehouses. There was nothing in his house or in all his realm that Hezekiah did not show them.
zh: 希西家就十分高興，並且把他的寶庫、銀子、金子、香料和貴重的油，以及他整個武器庫裡和他府庫裡的一切物件，都給使者們看；他家裡和他全國裡的東西，希西家沒有一樣不給他們看。

en: Then Isaiah the prophet came to King Hezekiah, and said to him, "What did these men say? And from where did they come to you?" Hezekiah said, "They have come to me from a far country, from Babylon."
zh: 於是以賽亞先知來見希西家王，問他說：“這些人說了些甚麼？他們從哪裡來見你？”希西家說：“他們是從遠方的巴比倫來見我的。”

en: He said, "What have they seen in your house?" Hezekiah answered, "They have seen all that is in my house. There is nothing in my storehouses that I did not show them."
zh: 以賽亞又問：“他們在你家裡看見了甚麼？”希西家回答：“我家中所有的，他們都看了；我的財寶中，沒有一樣不給他們看。”

en: Then Isaiah said to Hezekiah, "Hear the word of the LORD of hosts:
zh: 以賽亞對希西家說：“你要聽萬軍之耶和華的話。

en: Behold, the days are coming, when all that is in your house, and that which your fathers have stored up till this day, shall be carried to Babylon. Nothing shall be left, says the LORD.
zh: 看哪！日子必到，你家中所有的，以及你列祖所積蓄到今日的，都要被帶到巴比倫去，一樣也不留，這是耶和華說的。

en: And some of your own sons, who will come from you, whom you will father, shall be taken away, and they shall be eunuchs in the palace of the king of Babylon."
zh: 從你所出的眾子，就是你所生的，其中必有被擄去的，在巴比倫王宮裡作太監。”

en: Then said Hezekiah to Isaiah, "The word of the LORD that you have spoken is good." For he thought, "There will be peace and security in my days."
zh: 希西家對以賽亞說：“你所說耶和華的話不錯呀！”因為他心裡想：“在我有生之日，必有平安和穩固。”
